betterquesting:10.desc:8:
For some reason, Bees, while possessing the power to do it, refuse to bind their power to Infinity.
"You are one who can delve, but it is not for us to imprison this power."
There seems to be some sort of rule they do not dare break. Whether self-imposed or external, though, I do not know. Maybe it has to with their past history.
Given this law, though, they seem to be more than happy to operate within its gray areas. Sure, they cannot bind themselves to Infinity, but they can explain me how to bind a chicken to it.
Cluck-Cluck I guess...
